```{r}
    ggplot2::geom_tile(width = square_size, height = square_size, color = NA) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(x = organ_num, y = outcome_num, label = non_sig_marker), size = 5.5, color = "darkgrey", family = "Helvetica", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradientn(
      colors = c(
        "white",        # Start at 0
        "#C64D4D",      # Red (mid-high)
        "#B71C1C"       # Darker red (extreme high)
      ),
      values = scales::rescale(c(0, max_limit * 0.5, max_limit)),
      limits = c(0, max_limit),
      na.value = "white",
      name = "log(HR)",
      breaks = breaks,
      labels = labels
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(organ_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = organ_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(-square_size/2, length(organ_order) * square_size + square_size/2)
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(outcome_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = outcome_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(-square_size/2, length(outcome_order) * square_size + square_size/2)
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    ggplot2::theme(
      text = ggplot2::element_text(family = "Helvetica", color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, hjust = 0, margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 10), color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      legend.key.height = grid::unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.key.width = grid::unit(0.5, "cm"),
      panel.grid = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0, "lines"),
      panel.border = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm")
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_fixed(ratio = 1, expand = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = title_suffix)
}

wp_uni_heatmap <- make_wp_heatmap(ag_wp_uni_group_results, NULL)

if (!is.null(wp_uni_heatmap)) print(wp_uni_heatmap)

if (!is.null(wp_uni_heatmap)) {
  dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  ggplot2::ggsave(filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair", "ag_full_withinpair_hr_heatmap.svg"), plot = wp_uni_heatmap, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r ag_forest_tables_withinpair}
# AG within-pair
if (exists("ag_wp_uni_group_results") && nrow(ag_wp_uni_group_results) > 0) {
  dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  out_keys <- unique(ag_wp_uni_group_results$group_display)
  purrr::walk(out_keys, function(lbl) {
    df <- ag_wp_uni_group_results |>
      dplyr::filter(group_display == lbl) |>
      dplyr::mutate(Organ_Display = clean_organ_display(organ_age))
    p <- make_bw_forest_table(df, organ_col = "Organ_Display", eff_col = "hr", low_col = "ci_low", high_col = "ci_high", fdr_col = "fdr", title = lbl, axis_label = "Hazard Ratio (95% CI)")
    if (!is.null(p)) {
      fn <- paste0("ag_forest_", stringr::str_replace_all(tolower(lbl), " ", "_"), "_all_pairs.svg")
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = fn, plot = p, path = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
    }
  })
  
  # Create CSV tables directory
  csv_dir <- file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair", "tables")
  dir.create(csv_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Save CSV for all pairs
  purrr::walk(out_keys, function(lbl) {
    csv_data <- ag_wp_uni_group_results |>
      dplyr::filter(group_display == lbl) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        use_sci = pmax(abs(hr), abs(ci_low), abs(ci_high), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
        use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
        hr_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
          sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", hr, ci_low, ci_high),
          sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", hr, ci_low, ci_high)),
        Organ_Display = clean_organ_display(organ_age)
      ) |>
      dplyr::select(Organ = Organ_Display, `Effect (95% CI)` = hr_formatted, FDR = fdr)
    
    if (nrow(csv_data) > 0) {
      fn <- paste0("ag_", stringr::str_replace_all(tolower(lbl), " ", "_"), "_all_pairs.csv")
      write.csv(csv_data, file = file.path(csv_dir, fn), row.names = FALSE)
    }
  })
}
```

## Within-Pair Andersen-Gill Models (MZ Only)

```{r}
# Build within-pair AG data (MZ) for a disease grouping
essential_withinpair_ag_df_for_group_mz <- function(disease_labels) {
  events_g <- timeline |>
    dplyr::filter(.data[[label_col]] %in% disease_labels) |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, earliest_date, checkdate, has_disease, prevalent) |>
    dplyr::filter(has_disease == 1, prevalent == 0, earliest_date > checkdate) |>
    dplyr::mutate(event_time = as.numeric(earliest_date - checkdate) / 365.25) |>
    dplyr::arrange(twin_id, event_time) |>
    dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::lag(event_time, default = 0), stop = event_time, event = 1L) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  censor_g <- twins_fu |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, person_years) |>
    dplyr::left_join(events_g |>
      dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
      dplyr::summarise(last_stop = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"), by = "twin_id") |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::coalesce(last_stop, 0), stop = pmax(person_years, start), event = 0L) |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event)

  dplyr::bind_rows(
    events_g |> dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event),
    censor_g
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(stop > start, is.finite(stop)) |>
    dplyr::left_join(twins_fu |> dplyr::select(twin_id, age, sex, prevalent_mm, edyrs, eversmok, bmi, hba1c, total_hdl_ratio, crp), by = "twin_id") |>
    dplyr::left_join(twins |> dplyr::select(twin_id, pair_id, bestzyg), by = "twin_id") |>
    dplyr::filter(bestzyg == 1) |>
    dplyr::left_join(organ_age_mortality_clean, by = "twin_id")
}

# Run within-pair
ag_wp_uni_group_results_mz <- purrr::map_dfr(names(group_vectors), function(nm) {
  df_g <- essential_withinpair_ag_df_for_group_mz(group_vectors[[nm]])
  if (nrow(df_g) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
  purrr::map_dfr(organ_cols_ag_uni, ~fit_ag_uni_within(df_g, .x)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(group_key = nm)
}) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group_key) |>
  dplyr::mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "fdr")) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    group_display = unname(disease_groupings[group_key]),
    organ_age_clean = stringr::str_replace_all(organ_age, "_", " ") |> stringr::str_to_title()
  )

# Heatmaps for MZ only
wp_uni_heatmap_mz <- make_wp_heatmap(ag_wp_uni_group_results_mz, NULL)

if (!is.null(wp_uni_heatmap_mz)) print(wp_uni_heatmap_mz)

if (!is.null(wp_uni_heatmap_mz)) {
  dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  ggplot2::ggsave(filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair", "ag_full_withinpair_mz_hr_heatmap.svg"), plot = wp_uni_heatmap_mz, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r ag_forest_tables_withinpair_mz}
# AG within-pair (MZ)
if (exists("ag_wp_uni_group_results_mz") && nrow(ag_wp_uni_group_results_mz) > 0) {
  dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  out_keys <- unique(ag_wp_uni_group_results_mz$group_display)
  purrr::walk(out_keys, function(lbl) {
    df <- ag_wp_uni_group_results_mz |>
      dplyr::filter(group_display == lbl) |>
      dplyr::mutate(Organ_Display = clean_organ_display(organ_age))
    p <- make_bw_forest_table(df, organ_col = "Organ_Display", eff_col = "hr", low_col = "ci_low", high_col = "ci_high", fdr_col = "fdr", title = lbl, axis_label = "Hazard Ratio (95% CI)")
    if (!is.null(p)) {
      fn <- paste0("ag_forest_", stringr::str_replace_all(tolower(lbl), " ", "_"), "_mz_twins.svg")
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = fn, plot = p, path = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
    }
  })
  
  # Create CSV tables directory
  csv_dir <- file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "ag", "within_pair", "tables")
  dir.create(csv_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Save CSV for MZ twins
  purrr::walk(out_keys, function(lbl) {
    csv_data <- ag_wp_uni_group_results_mz |>
      dplyr::filter(group_display == lbl) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        use_sci = pmax(abs(hr), abs(ci_low), abs(ci_high), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
        use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
        hr_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
          sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", hr, ci_low, ci_high),
          sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", hr, ci_low, ci_high)),
        Organ_Display = clean_organ_display(organ_age)
      ) |>
      dplyr::select(Organ = Organ_Display, `Effect (95% CI)` = hr_formatted, FDR = fdr)
    
    if (nrow(csv_data) > 0) {
      fn <- paste0("ag_", stringr::str_replace_all(tolower(lbl), " ", "_"), "_mz_twins.csv")
      write.csv(csv_data, file = file.path(csv_dir, fn), row.names = FALSE)
    }
  })
}
```

# Mean Cumulative Function by Aging Group

```{r mcf_by_extreme_ager, echo=TRUE}
# Parameters
extreme_csv_path <- input_extreme_organ_file
extreme_definition <- "n_aged >= 1"  # e.g., "n_aged >= 1", "n_extreme >= 2"
use_all_diseases <- TRUE             # TRUE = use any incident disease (uses existing ag_df)
# Set to FALSE to restrict to a specific disease grouping
group_labels <- NULL                 # e.g., cvd_multimorbidity (character vector of labels)

# Ensure AG data is available
if (!exists("ag_df")) {
  twins_fu <- twins |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, age, sex, time_to_death, edyrs, eversmok, bmi, hba1c, total_hdl_ratio, crp) |>
    dplyr::mutate(person_years = time_to_death / 365.25, sex = as.factor(sex)) |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      composite_diseases |> janitor::clean_names() |> dplyr::select(twin_id, prevalent_mm),
      by = "twin_id"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(prevalent_mm = dplyr::coalesce(prevalent_mm, 0))

  events_any <- timeline |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, earliest_date, checkdate, has_disease, prevalent) |>
    dplyr::filter(has_disease == 1, prevalent == 0, earliest_date > checkdate) |>
    dplyr::mutate(event_time = as.numeric(earliest_date - checkdate) / 365.25) |>
    dplyr::arrange(twin_id, event_time) |>
    dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::lag(event_time, default = 0), stop = event_time, event = 1L) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  censor_any <- twins_fu |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, person_years) |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      events_any |>
        dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
        dplyr::summarise(last_stop = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
      by = "twin_id"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::coalesce(last_stop, 0), stop = pmax(person_years, start), event = 0L) |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event)

  ag_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    events_any |> dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event),
    censor_any
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(stop > start, is.finite(stop)) |>
    dplyr::left_join(twins_fu |> dplyr::select(twin_id, age, sex, prevalent_mm, edyrs, eversmok, bmi, hba1c, total_hdl_ratio, crp), by = "twin_id")
}

# Optionally restrict to one disease grouping
if (!use_all_diseases) {
  stopifnot(!is.null(group_labels), exists("label_col"))
  events_g <- timeline |>
    dplyr::filter(.data[[label_col]] %in% group_labels) |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, earliest_date, checkdate, has_disease, prevalent) |>
    dplyr::filter(has_disease == 1, prevalent == 0, earliest_date > checkdate) |>
    dplyr::mutate(event_time = as.numeric(earliest_date - checkdate) / 365.25) |>
    dplyr::arrange(twin_id, event_time) |>
    dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::lag(event_time, default = 0), stop = event_time, event = 1L) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  censor_g <- ag_df |>
    dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
    dplyr::summarise(person_years = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      events_g |>
        dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
        dplyr::summarise(last_stop = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
      by = "twin_id"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::coalesce(last_stop, 0), stop = pmax(person_years, start), event = 0L) |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event)

  ag_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    events_g |> dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event),
    censor_g
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(stop > start, is.finite(stop)) |>
    dplyr::left_join(ag_df |> dplyr::select(twin_id, age, sex, prevalent_mm, edyrs, eversmok, bmi, hba1c, total_hdl_ratio, crp) |> dplyr::distinct(), by = "twin_id")
}

# Load extreme-ager flags
extreme_organs <- readr::read_csv(extreme_csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Define baseline aging groups
extreme_with_flags <- extreme_organs |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    extreme_aged = !! rlang::parse_expr(extreme_definition),
    extreme_young = n_young >= 1
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(twin_id, extreme_aged, extreme_young)

ag_df_strat <- ag_df |>
  dplyr::left_join(extreme_with_flags, by = "twin_id") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    extreme_aged = dplyr::coalesce(extreme_aged, FALSE),
    extreme_young = dplyr::coalesce(extreme_young, FALSE),
    # Create 3-level grouping
    aging_group = dplyr::case_when(
      extreme_aged ~ "Extreme aged",
      extreme_young ~ "Extreme young", 
      TRUE ~ "Normal"
    )
  )

# Mean Cumulative Function (nonparametric)
compute_mcf <- function(df) {
  ev <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(event == 1L) |>
    dplyr::select(time = stop)

  if (nrow(ev) == 0) return(tibble::tibble(time = numeric(), mcf = numeric()))
  t_unique <- sort(unique(ev$time))

  # Risk set at time t: intervals covering t
  at_risk <- vapply(
    t_unique,
    function(t) sum(df$start < t & df$stop >= t),
    numeric(1)
  )
  d_t <- vapply(
    t_unique,
    function(t) sum(ev$time == t),
    numeric(1)
  )
  incr <- ifelse(at_risk > 0, d_t / at_risk, 0)
  tibble::tibble(time = t_unique, mcf = cumsum(incr))
}

# MCF with confidence intervals using Greenwood-like variance
compute_mcf_with_ci <- function(df) {
  ev <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(event == 1L) |>
    dplyr::select(time = stop)

  if (nrow(ev) == 0) return(tibble::tibble(time = numeric(), mcf = numeric(), ci_low = numeric(), ci_high = numeric()))
  t_unique <- sort(unique(ev$time))

  at_risk <- vapply(
    t_unique,
    function(t) sum(df$start < t & df$stop >= t),
    numeric(1)
  )
  d_t <- vapply(
    t_unique,
    function(t) sum(ev$time == t),
    numeric(1)
  )
  incr <- ifelse(at_risk > 0, d_t / at_risk, 0)
  
  # Variance estimate (Greenwood-like)
  var_incr <- ifelse(at_risk > 1, d_t / (at_risk * (at_risk - 1)), 0)
  cumvar <- cumsum(var_incr)
  se <- sqrt(cumvar)
  
  mcf_vals <- cumsum(incr)
  tibble::tibble(
    time = t_unique, 
    mcf = mcf_vals,
    ci_low = pmax(0, mcf_vals - 1.96 * se),
    ci_high = mcf_vals + 1.96 * se
  )
}

mcf_by_stratum <- ag_df_strat |>
  dplyr::group_split(aging_group) |>
  purrr::map_dfr(function(g) {
    est <- compute_mcf(g)
    if (nrow(est) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
    est |>
      dplyr::mutate(aging_group = unique(g$aging_group))
  })

# Plot
mcf_plot <- mcf_by_stratum |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = time, y = mcf, color = aging_group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_step(linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Extreme aged" = "#D6604D", 
      "Extreme young" = "#2166AC", 
      "Normal" = "#2E8B57"
    ),
    breaks = c("Extreme young", "Normal", "Extreme aged")
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(x = "Years since baseline", y = "Mean cumulative count", color = NULL) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank())

mcf_plot


```

# Organ-Specific MCF

```{r flexible_mcf_analysis, echo=TRUE}
# Parameters for flexible analysis
target_organ <- "Brain"  # e.g., "Brain", "Heart", "Liver", "Lung", etc. (capitalized)
target_disease_group <- "neuropsychiatric_multimorbidity"  # or NULL for all diseases
extreme_definition_young <- paste0("young_", target_organ, " == 1")
extreme_definition_aged <- paste0("aged_", target_organ, " == 1")

# Load extreme-ager flags for specific organ
extreme_organs_specific <- extreme_organs |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    extreme_young_specific = !! rlang::parse_expr(extreme_definition_young),
    extreme_aged_specific = !! rlang::parse_expr(extreme_definition_aged)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(twin_id, extreme_young_specific, extreme_aged_specific)

# Build AG data for specific disease group if specified
if (!is.null(target_disease_group)) {
  # Use existing disease grouping vectors
  disease_labels <- group_vectors[[target_disease_group]]
  
  events_specific <- timeline |>
    dplyr::filter(.data[[label_col]] %in% disease_labels) |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, earliest_date, checkdate, has_disease, prevalent) |>
    dplyr::filter(has_disease == 1, prevalent == 0, earliest_date > checkdate) |>
    dplyr::mutate(event_time = as.numeric(earliest_date - checkdate) / 365.25) |>
    dplyr::arrange(twin_id, event_time) |>
    dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::lag(event_time, default = 0), stop = event_time, event = 1L) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  censor_specific <- ag_df |>
    dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
    dplyr::summarise(person_years = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      events_specific |>
        dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
        dplyr::summarise(last_stop = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
      by = "twin_id"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::coalesce(last_stop, 0), stop = pmax(person_years, start), event = 0L) |>
    dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event)

  ag_df_specific <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    events_specific |> dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event),
    censor_specific
  ) |>
    dplyr::filter(stop > start, is.finite(stop)) |>
    dplyr::left_join(ag_df |> dplyr::select(twin_id, age, sex, prevalent_mm, edyrs, eversmok, bmi, hba1c, total_hdl_ratio, crp) |> dplyr::distinct(), by = "twin_id")
} else {
  # Use all diseases
  ag_df_specific <- ag_df
}

# Create organ-specific aging groups
ag_df_specific_strat <- ag_df_specific |>
  dplyr::left_join(extreme_organs_specific, by = "twin_id") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    extreme_young_specific = dplyr::coalesce(extreme_young_specific, FALSE),
    extreme_aged_specific = dplyr::coalesce(extreme_aged_specific, FALSE),
    # Create 3-level grouping for specific organ
    aging_group_specific = dplyr::case_when(
      extreme_aged_specific ~ "Extremely aged",
      extreme_young_specific ~ "Extremely young", 
      TRUE ~ "Normal"
    )
  )

# Compute MCF with confidence intervals for specific organ and disease group
mcf_specific <- ag_df_specific_strat |>
  dplyr::group_split(aging_group_specific) |>
  purrr::map_dfr(function(g) {
    est <- compute_mcf_with_ci(g)
    if (nrow(est) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
    est |>
      dplyr::mutate(aging_group_specific = unique(g$aging_group_specific))
  })

# Create color mapping dynamically
aged_label <- paste0("Extreme aged (", target_organ, ")")
young_label <- paste0("Extreme young (", target_organ, ")")

color_mapping <- c(
  "Extremely aged" = "#D6604D",  # red for aged
  "Extremely young" = "#2166AC", # blue for young  
  "Normal" = "#2E8B57"           # green for normal
)

# Plot specific analysis with confidence intervals
mcf_specific_plot <- mcf_specific |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = time, y = mcf, color = aging_group_specific)) +
  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(ggplot2::aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high, fill = aging_group_specific), 
                       alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  ggplot2::geom_step(linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = color_mapping,
    breaks = c("Extremely young", "Normal", "Extremely aged")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    values = color_mapping,
    breaks = c("Extremely young", "Normal", "Extremely aged")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Years since baseline", 
    y = "Mean cumulative count", 
    color = NULL,
    fill = NULL,
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "bottom", 
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 35, l = 5, unit = "pt")
  )

mcf_specific_plot

# Age distribution for specific analysis
age_summary_specific <- ag_df_specific_strat |>
  dplyr::group_by(aging_group_specific) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_people = n_distinct(twin_id),
    mean_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# Save specific analysis
dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", 
                       paste0("mcf_", tolower(target_organ), "_", target_disease_group, ".pdf")),
  plot = mcf_specific_plot, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300
)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", 
                       paste0("mcf_", tolower(target_organ), "_", target_disease_group, ".png")),
  plot = mcf_specific_plot, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 400
)
```

# Granular MCF
```{r granular_mcf_analysis, echo=TRUE}
# Create granular aging groups based on number of extreme organs
ag_df_granular <- ag_df |>
  dplyr::left_join(extreme_organs, by = "twin_id") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Handle missing values
    n_aged = dplyr::coalesce(n_aged, 0),
    n_young = dplyr::coalesce(n_young, 0),
    n_extreme = dplyr::coalesce(n_extreme, 0),
    
    # Create granular aging groups
    aging_group_granular = dplyr::case_when(
      n_aged >= 6 ~ "6+ aged organs",
      n_aged >= 5 ~ "5 aged organs", 
      n_aged >= 4 ~ "4 aged organs",
      n_aged >= 3 ~ "3 aged organs",
      n_aged >= 2 ~ "2 aged organs",
      n_aged >= 1 ~ "1 aged organ",
      n_young >= 6 ~ "6+ young organs",
      n_young >= 5 ~ "5 young organs",
      n_young >= 4 ~ "4 young organs", 
      n_young >= 3 ~ "3 young organs",
      n_young >= 2 ~ "2 young organs",
      n_young >= 1 ~ "1 young organ",
      TRUE ~ "Normal (0 extreme)"
    ),
    
    # Create simplified groups for plotting
    aging_group_simple = dplyr::case_when(
      n_aged >= 2 ~ "2+ aged organs",
      n_aged == 1 ~ "1 aged organ",
      n_young >= 1 ~ "Young",
      TRUE ~ "Normal"
    ),
    aging_group_simple = factor(
      aging_group_simple,
      levels = c("Young", "Normal", "1 aged organ", "2+ aged organs")
    )
  )

# Compute MCF for granular analysis with confidence intervals
mcf_granular_ci <- ag_df_granular |>
  dplyr::group_split(aging_group_simple) |>
  purrr::map_dfr(function(g) {
    est <- compute_mcf_with_ci(g)
    if (nrow(est) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
    est |>
      dplyr::mutate(aging_group_simple = unique(g$aging_group_simple))
  })

# Define color palette for granular groups
granular_colors <- c(
  "Normal" = "#2E8B57",            # Green (healthiest)
  "Young" = "#4169E1",             # Blue (young)
  "1 aged organ" = "#FFA500",      # Orange (mild aging)
  "2+ aged organs" = "#DC143C"     # Crimson (severe aging)
)

# Plot granular MCF with confidence intervals
mcf_granular_plot <- mcf_granular_ci |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = time, y = mcf, color = aging_group_simple)) +
  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(ggplot2::aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high, fill = aging_group_simple), 
                       alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  ggplot2::geom_step(linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = granular_colors,
    breaks = c("Young", "Normal", "1 aged organ", "2+ aged organs")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    values = granular_colors,
    breaks = c("Young", "Normal", "1 aged organ", "2+ aged organs")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Years since baseline", 
    y = "Mean cumulative count",
    color = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "bottom", 
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 35, l = 5, unit = "pt")
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(
    color = ggplot2::guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  )

mcf_granular_plot

# Summary statistics for granular groups
granular_summary <- ag_df_granular |>
  dplyr::group_by(aging_group_simple) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_people = n_distinct(twin_id),
    mean_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_n_aged = mean(n_aged, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_n_young = mean(n_young, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(desc(mean_n_aged), mean_n_young)


# Save granular analysis
dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", "mcf_granular_organ_aging.pdf"),
  plot = mcf_granular_plot, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300
)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", "mcf_granular_organ_aging.png"),
  plot = mcf_granular_plot, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 400
)
```

# Kaplan-Meier: Granular Aging Patterns
```{r km_granular_organ_aging, echo=TRUE}
# Create survival dataset with death indicator and aging groups
km_survival_data <- twins |>
  dplyr::select(twin_id, deathdate, checkdate, birthdate, time_to_death) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    deceased = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(deathdate), 1, 0),
    person_years = time_to_death / 365.25
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(extreme_organs, by = "twin_id") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    n_aged = dplyr::coalesce(n_aged, 0),
    n_young = dplyr::coalesce(n_young, 0),
    aging_group_simple = dplyr::case_when(
      n_aged >= 2 ~ "2+ aged organs",
      n_aged == 1 ~ "1 aged organ",
      n_young >= 1 ~ "Young",
      TRUE ~ "Normal"
    ),
    aging_group_simple = factor(
      aging_group_simple, 
      levels = c("Young", "Normal", "1 aged organ", "2+ aged organs")
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(person_years), person_years > 0)

# Fit Kaplan-Meier model
km_fit <- survival::survfit(
  survival::Surv(time = person_years, event = deceased) ~ aging_group_simple,
  data = km_survival_data
)

# Define color palette
km_colors <- c(
  "Normal" = "#2E8B57",            # Green (healthiest)
  "Young" = "#4169E1",             # Blue (young)
  "1 aged organ" = "#E53935",      # Light red (mild aging)
  "2+ aged organs" = "#B71C1C"     # Dark red (severe aging)
)

# Extract survival data from survfit object for ggplot2
km_data_plot <- broom::tidy(km_fit) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    aging_group_simple = factor(
      stringr::str_remove(strata, "aging_group_simple="),
      levels = c("Young", "Normal", "1 aged organ", "2+ aged organs")
    )
  )

# Create survival plot with ggplot2
km_plot <- km_data_plot |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = aging_group_simple)) +
  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = aging_group_simple), 
    alpha = 0.1, 
    color = NA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_step(linewidth = 1.5) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 22), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5)) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = km_colors,
    breaks = c("Young", "Normal", "1 aged organ", "2+ aged organs"),
    name = "Organ aging"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    values = km_colors,
    breaks = c("Young", "Normal", "1 aged organ", "2+ aged organs"),
    name = "Organ aging"
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Years since baseline", 
    y = "Survival probability"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.02),
    legend.justification = c(0, 0),
    legend.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.8), color = NA),
    legend.box.margin = ggplot2::margin(5, 5, 5, 5),
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "plain"),
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "plain"),
    axis.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, face = "plain")
  )

print(km_plot)

# Summary statistics
km_summary_stats <- km_survival_data |>
  dplyr::group_by(aging_group_simple) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_individuals = n(),
    n_deaths = sum(deceased),
    death_rate = round(sum(deceased) / n() * 100, 1),
    mean_followup = round(mean(person_years, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Log-rank test
km_logrank <- survival::survdiff(
  survival::Surv(time = person_years, event = deceased) ~ aging_group_simple,
  data = km_survival_data
)

# Extract median survival times
km_median_survival <- summary(km_fit)$table |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("group") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = stringr::str_remove(group, "aging_group_simple=")
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(group, median, `0.95LCL`, `0.95UCL`)
# Save KM plot
dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other"), 
           recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", 
                       "km_granular_organ_aging.pdf"),
  plot = km_plot,
  width = 5,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", 
                       "km_granular_organ_aging.png"),
  plot = km_plot,
  width = 5,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 400
)
```

# GI Aging vs Digestive Disease
```{r gi_aging_digestive, echo=TRUE}
# Parameters for GI aging vs. digestive diseases
target_organ <- "Gastrointestinal Tract"  # Note: capitalized as in the data
target_disease_group <- "digestive_multimorbidity"

# Load extreme-ager flags for GI tract
extreme_organs_gi <- extreme_organs |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    extreme_young_gi = young_Gastrointestinal == 1,
    extreme_aged_gi = aged_Gastrointestinal == 1
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(twin_id, extreme_young_gi, extreme_aged_gi)

# Build AG data for digestive diseases
disease_labels <- group_vectors[[target_disease_group]]

events_gi <- timeline |>
  dplyr::filter(.data[[label_col]] %in% disease_labels) |>
  dplyr::select(twin_id, earliest_date, checkdate, has_disease, prevalent) |>
  dplyr::filter(has_disease == 1, prevalent == 0, earliest_date > checkdate) |>
  dplyr::mutate(event_time = as.numeric(earliest_date - checkdate) / 365.25) |>
  dplyr::arrange(twin_id, event_time) |>
  dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
  dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::lag(event_time, default = 0), stop = event_time, event = 1L) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

censor_gi <- ag_df |>
  dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
  dplyr::summarise(person_years = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    events_gi |>
      dplyr::group_by(twin_id) |>
      dplyr::summarise(last_stop = max(stop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
    by = "twin_id"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(start = dplyr::coalesce(last_stop, 0), stop = pmax(person_years, start), event = 0L) |>
  dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event)

ag_df_gi <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  events_gi |> dplyr::select(twin_id, start, stop, event),
  censor_gi
) |>
  dplyr::filter(stop > start, is.finite(stop)) |>
  dplyr::left_join(ag_df |> dplyr::select(twin_id, age, sex, prevalent_mm) |> dplyr::distinct(), by = "twin_id")

# Create GI-specific aging groups
ag_df_gi_strat <- ag_df_gi |>
  dplyr::left_join(extreme_organs_gi, by = "twin_id") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    extreme_young_gi = dplyr::coalesce(extreme_young_gi, FALSE),
    extreme_aged_gi = dplyr::coalesce(extreme_aged_gi, FALSE),
    # Create 3-level grouping for GI tract
    aging_group_gi = dplyr::case_when(
      extreme_aged_gi ~ "Extremely aged",
      extreme_young_gi ~ "Extremely young", 
      TRUE ~ "Normal"
    )
  )

# Compute MCF for GI aging and digestive diseases
mcf_gi <- ag_df_gi_strat |>
  dplyr::group_split(aging_group_gi) |>
  purrr::map_dfr(function(g) {
    est <- compute_mcf_with_ci(g)
    if (nrow(est) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
    est |>
      dplyr::mutate(aging_group_gi = unique(g$aging_group_gi))
  })

# Create color mapping for GI analysis
gi_colors <- c(
  "Extremely aged" = "#D6604D", 
  "Extremely young" = "#2166AC", 
  "Normal" = "#2E8B57"
)

# Plot GI aging vs. digestive diseases
mcf_gi_plot <- mcf_gi |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = time, y = mcf, color = aging_group_gi)) +
  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(ggplot2::aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high, fill = aging_group_gi), 
                       alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  ggplot2::geom_step(linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = gi_colors,
    breaks = c("Extremely young", "Normal", "Extremely aged")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    values = gi_colors,
    breaks = c("Extremely young", "Normal", "Extremely aged")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Years since baseline", 
    y = "Mean cumulative count",
    color = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "bottom", 
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 35, l = 5, unit = "pt")
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(
    color = ggplot2::guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  )

mcf_gi_plot

# Age distribution for GI analysis
age_summary_gi <- ag_df_gi_strat |>
  dplyr::group_by(aging_group_gi) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_people = n_distinct(twin_id),
    mean_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# Save GI analysis
dir.create(file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", "mcf_gi_aging_digestive.pdf"),
  plot = mcf_gi_plot, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300
)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_multimorbidity_core_dir, "other", "mcf_gi_aging_digestive.png"),
  plot = mcf_gi_plot, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 400
)
```
